name: Herbed Salmon Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can salmon (16 oz), drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the bouillon cubes in the boiling water.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl; mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into a well-greased crockpot.
4. Cover and cook on high setting for 2 to 4 hours, stirring occasionally.
